name: avs-migration-planner
description: Azure VMware Solution migration planner — VS Code extension + MCP server + AI tools. CSV/RVTools import, AVS node sizing (AV36-AV64), live Azure pricing, 5-year TCO, Defender costs, wave planning, HCX configs, Bicep IaC, 7-sheet Excel reports, node selection guide, @avs Copilot Chat, Language Model Tools, and 7-tool MCP server for any AI client.

chatParticipants.name: avs
chatParticipants.description: Ask questions about your Azure VMware Solution migration plan — sizing, costs, risks, waves, and architecture.

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Deep analysis of the imported VM inventory with AI insights

commands.name: recommend
commands.description: Architecture recommendations based on workload mix

commands.name: risk
commands.description: Risk assessment for each migration wave

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain any part of the migration plan in plain language

languageModelTools.name: avsMigrationPlanner_getSizing
languageModelTools.description: Returns AVS node sizing recommendations for the imported VM inventory — node types, utilization, fit scores, driving dimension.

languageModelTools.name: avsMigrationPlanner_getCosts
languageModelTools.description: Returns AVS cost comparison (PAYG, 1yr RI, 3yr RI) for all node types based on the imported VM inventory.

languageModelTools.name: avsMigrationPlanner_getNodeAdvice
languageModelTools.description: Returns architect-level node selection rationale with cost efficiency, waste analysis, regional warnings, and workload archetypes.

region.description: Azure region to check node availability (e.g., eastus, uksouth). Defaults to configured pricing region.

languageModelTools.name: avsMigrationPlanner_getWavePlan
languageModelTools.description: Returns migration wave plan summary — waves, VMs per wave, risk levels, durations, scheduling.

languageModelTools.name: avsMigrationPlanner_checkRegion
languageModelTools.description: Checks which AVS node types (AV36, AV36P, AV52, AV48, AV64) are available in a given Azure region, plus stretched cluster and Gen 2 support.

region.description: Azure region name (e.g., eastus, uksouth, westeurope)

avsMigrationPlanner.wave.maxVMsPerWave.description: Maximum number of VMs per migration wave.

avsMigrationPlanner.wave.daysBetweenWave.description: Days between migration wave start dates.

avsMigrationPlanner.wave.throughputGBPer.description: Aggregate HCX throughput in GB/hr (100 for 1Gbps ER, 500-800 for 10Gbps ER).

avsMigrationPlanner.pricing.region.description: Azure region for pricing lookup (e.g., eastus, westeurope).
